name: her-estrogen
description: Her Estrogen marketing site + post-quiz checkout. Static front-end (HTML + CDN React + Babel-standalone) with Vercel Serverless Functions. Production payments processed by OpenLoop via webhooks (api/orders/*); Stripe scaffold (api/checkout, api/webhooks/stripe) is dormant and gated behind STRIPE_ENABLED.

scripts.build: esbuild app.jsx --minify --target=es2018 --outfile=app.bundle.js && esbuild quiz.src.jsx --minify --target=es2018 --outfile=quiz.bundle.js && esbuild results.jsx --minify --target=es2018 --outfile=results.bundle.js

comment_build: Bundles are built LOCALLY and committed (Vercel serves them statically — no Vercel build step). After editing app.jsx, quiz.src.jsx, or results.jsx you MUST run `npm run build` and re-sync, or the live site will not reflect your changes.
